pending_approvals.risk_summary: Continuous 24-hour daemon execution with automated lease recovery and fencing.
pending_approvals.start_conditions: All preflight checklist verification scripts must report PASS.
pending_approvals.stop_conditions: Operator hold triggered, process exit code != 0, or heartbeat observer timeout.

pending_approvals.title: OPENAI / ANTHROPIC provisioning
pending_approvals.description: Founder to provide API keys and configure credentials. Blocks: Critic seat and Rung 2 live evaluation.

pending_approvals.title: Apple Developer access
pending_approvals.description: Founder to register developer account and invite agent. Blocks: App Store Connect provisioning.

pending_approvals.title: App Store Connect and bundle ID
pending_approvals.description: Founder to create bundle ID com.hasf.rmfcompanion and register App on ASC. Blocks: TestFlight packaging and submission.

pending_approvals.title: signing certificates / provisioning profiles
pending_approvals.description: Founder to generate iOS Distribution certificate and provisioning profile. Blocks: TestFlight build signing.

pending_approvals.title: remote host credential posture
pending_approvals.description: Founder to set up safe SSH keys on remote droplets. Blocks: Remote VPS deployment.

pending_approvals.title: secrets inventory
pending_approvals.description: Founder to review secrets stored in .secrets/ has_live_project_tracker/data/. Blocks: E2E secure deployment.
